items.name: Instamatic Tent
items.description: Tent - activate!  Bam - you've got a tent.  No messing around with poles and stakes for you!

items.name: Bloxster BZR
items.description: If you ain't first, you're last!

items.name: Spider Slasher
items.description: Click to slash double-click to lunge and do 12 damage. When you lunge, you also shoot a web in the the direction of your cursor. If it hits somebody, their speed is reduced to 6 for a few seconds, giving you an opportunity to catch up to them. While slashing your enemy with the sword, there is a 30% chance of poisoning them!

items.name: Crossbow of the Sea
items.description: Shoots magical water arrows that spawn water wherever they hit.

items.name: Chocolate Gelt
items.description: Who knew money could be so yummy!

items.name: Merely's Web Slinger
items.description: Nobody slings web like Merely.  Nobody. Srsly.

items.name: Sword of the Seas
items.description: Click to slash at your foes and deal 15 damage.  When you are tired of this, unleash the wrath of the waves upon your foes with the special attack key 'Q'

items.name: Race the Sunset
items.description: Another original ROBLOX 2D game.  Can you beat the sunset?

items.name: 8-Bit Wizarding Staff
items.description: Wham, bam, alakazam! Click to spawn deadly fireballs at your foes.

items.name: Golden Sword of Spring Growth
items.description: Spring is here and gold is best. Best your foes by slashing them or by spawning a deadly field of protective poisonous flowers.  Click to slash and do 30-35 damage per hit. Press 'Q' to  spawn a deadly field of white, blue, gold, and violet flowers around you, preventing your enemies from coming up to you. Anyone that attempts to enter the field of flowers will be massively damaged every second they're in it.

items.name: Flute
items.description: Time to go out enjoy the breeze  and play some soothing music! Watch as you play the flute, nearby Robloxians dancing to your tune!

items.name: Military Dress Sword
items.description: Sword of honor, sword of might, strike the right foe tonight.  This sword slashes and lunges.  For a special attack press 'W' twice before striking.

items.name: Bloxster STB
items.description: Leave 'em in the sparkles and dust.

items.name: Seranok's Rocket Jumper
items.description: Aim at the ground to propel yourself into the air!  Also shoot rockets at people.

items.name: Fermion Blade
items.description: Beware the wrath of the holder of the Fermion Blade. It may look cheerful, but after feeling its power, you probably won't be.

items.name: Personal Fighter Jets
items.description: Equip and click to spawn three personal fighter jets that fly around you. When there is an enemy within a 75 stud radius of you, they fire rockets at them!

items.name: DarkAge Ninja Bow
items.description: Click and hold to charge the arrow, the longer you charge, the more powerful the arrow gets. Max damage is between 15 and 55, depending on the charge. Hit 'Q' key to activate the special DarkAge Ninja attack for the ages! This attack rains arrows from the sky around your target.

items.name: Latke
items.description: Pass the apple sauce plz....

items.name: Ice Breaker
items.description: First he makes it - then he breaks it!  Freeze your enemies, then destroy them while they're stuck in your icy trap.  Does an astounding 14 damage per hit.

items.name: Gearworks Sword
items.description: A swift sword that does 12 to 18 damage per hit. Watch out for the steam though!

items.name: Bald Eagle
items.description: America's proud symbol flies above you and protects you with the very latest Amerilaser defense... or offense depending on how you look at it.

items.name: Double Sword Punch
items.description: Dual version of the original Sword Punch. Click to slash at your enemies, which does 19 to 26 damage. Double click to do even more damage.

items.name: Uppercut Sword
items.description: This gigantic sword will throw your enemies into the air and let you do as much damage as you can for 5 seconds.

items.name: Misfortune Cookie
items.description: It's not going to bring you luck but it might be fun.

items.name: Sword of Nefertiti
items.description: Wrath of the gods. And those ancient Egyptian gods were pretty wrathful.

items.name: Winter Snow Sled
items.description: Just add slippery slope!

items.name: Spec Zeta Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: After the tremendous success of the Epsilon sword, only one person was left who understood how to make energy swords.  This is largely due to the scientists testing the swords on one another in an effort to create the best product possible (and to keep all the profit for themselves).  The last scientist left standing created only 200 of these before he was spawn killed by a noob holding his own sword.

items.name: Deluxe Hook Shot
items.description: This deluxe grappling hook will pull small unanchored object (like other players) towards you.  When used on larger items, it will propel you toward the item or place.

items.name: Steam Engine
items.description: Guide this fancy steam engine towards your foes with the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys.  When you get close enough right click to throw dangerous train shrapnel at them! Hit the 'X' key for an explosive surprise.

items.name: Poisoned Skeleton Scythe
items.description: Dangerous to anyone who get's hit. In addition to the slash damage, there is a 25% change of poisoning anyone you hit. If poisoned your foe will be unable to jump and can only walk at half speed.
